creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
I cannot reproduce.  I tried 2.0.0.9 on 8-CURRENT on amd64, and it works
just fine.  Note: I do not have eningmail installed, so that may be part
of the problem.  Please try without enigmail, and see if that helps.  If
it does, you should take this crash up with the enigmail maintainer.
Perhaps you need an update (or recompile) there as well.

Joe

-- 
Joe Marcus Clarke
FreeBSD GNOME Team      ::      gnome@FreeBSD.org
FreeNode / #freebsd-gnome
http://www.FreeBSD.org/gnome
